steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The verb blank has “which” as its subject, referring to the noun “the Nerf football.”

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
The rule of subject-verb agreement requires the verb to match the number of its subject. Choice D (‘is a smaller, foam version’) correctly uses the singular verb “is” to match the singular subject. The other choices use plural verbs that violate this rule.
That confirms D is correct.
